decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hover_effects: expressive — tilt, glow, border animations, underline slides
border_radius: pill — fully rounded on small elements
image_treatment: no clip — square with heavy shadow
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
quirk: include a decorative large quotation mark near the bio
bonus_quirk: the daily regen banner is styled as a handwritten note
